eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Burke, NC; at 01:17 PM ON FEB 25, 2026 Effective until 09:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is an urgent message from your local authorities.

We are asking for the public's assistance in locating a missing 17-year-old, 5 ft 10 in. Hispanic male who was reported missing on February 24th, 2026.

He was last seen between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM, leaving a residence on Lovelady Road. He was riding a blue bicycle and wearing a black helmet at the time. He may also be wearing a dark green hoodie and unknown shorts or pants.

If you have seen anyone matching this description or have any information regarding his whereabouts, please contact your local law enforcement agency immediately or call 911.

Again, a 17-year-old male was last seen on Lovelady Road on February 24th between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM, riding a blue bicycle and wearing a black helmet.

Please check your property, security cameras, and surrounding areas.

Your assistance is greatly appreciated. If located or if you have any information call 911 immediately or contact your local law enforcement agency
